description: Search the open web through reproducible network search providers when the user explicitly asks for Google, web, browser, arXiv, or general internet search instead of a PubMed-only query.

inputContract.prompt: Free text web search query. Explicit Google/web/browser/arXiv requests should use this skill instead of PubMed.

environment.migrationStatus: workspace task; mirrors AgentServer web_search semantics for reproducible BioAgent runs

validationSmoke.prompt: 通过google搜索一下今天arxiv上AI+生命科学的文章

examplePrompts: 通过google搜索一下今天arxiv上AI+生命科学的文章
Search the web for recent AI biology arXiv papers
Use browser/web search for CRISPR base editing news
